title: ActiveInferants

abstract: In this paper, we introduce an active inference model of ant colony foraging behavior, and implement the model in a series of in silico experiments. Active inference is a multiscale approach to behavioral modeling being applied across settings in theoretical biology and ethology. We specify and simulate a Markov decision process (MDP) model for ant colony foraging using the alternating T-maze paradigm, illustrating the model's ability to recover basic colony phenomena such as trail formation aft
